bugs_fixed.symptom: AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'get' — when cost_ledger.json is a list
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Assumed ledger is always a dict keyed by date. Fails when ledger is a list of individual records.
bugs_fixed.fix: Runtime type checking: if list, filter records by date and sum 'actual' field; if dict, use legacy .get(date) logic

bugs_fixed.symptom: AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'setdefault' — when appending usage record
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Assumed ledger is always a dict. Tried to call .setdefault() on list.
bugs_fixed.fix: Runtime type checking: if list, append record to list; if dict, use legacy day structure with daily totals

changes_summary.get_daily_spend: Added isinstance() checks for list vs dict; filters list by timestamp prefix; sums 'actual' field
changes_summary.record_usage: Refactored to build record dict once, then branch by ledger type; appends to list or uses legacy dict structure
